description_long: This is a classical, ornamental plant pot made from a light-colored stone or concrete material. The pot features a wide, rounded rim and a deep bowl, ideal for holding soil and plants. Around the upper exterior, there is a decorative band adorned with evenly spaced floral rosette motifs, adding an elegant touch. The body of the pot is bulbous with a scalloped lower edge, sitting atop a sturdy, flared pedestal base that provides stability. The surface appears slightly weathered, suggesting it is suitable for outdoor use in gardens or parks. The interior is smooth and spacious, capable of accommodating medium-sized plants.
description: A decorative, stone-like plant pot with floral motifs and a wide, rounded bowl on a pedestal base. Its classic design and sturdy build make it ideal for outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the floral rosette band and the full curvature of the bowl and pedestal.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bowl and the continuous decorative band.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the scalloped lower edge and pedestal base.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the pot's rounded form and ornamental details.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used as a decorative planter in landscaped public spaces or formal gardens
